problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: The key to What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? is Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient — specifically Forward osmosis using — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
